name: gps-design-systems-lwc
description: LWC implementations of a collection of Public Sector Design Systems

scripts.build: npx tsc --project sfGpsDs/main/default/lwc; npx tsc --project sfGpsDsAuNsw/main/default/lwc; npx tsc --project sfGpsDsAuQld/main/default/lwc; npx tsc --project sfGpsDsAuVic2/main/default/lwc; npx tsc --project sfGpsDsAuVic2Showcase/main/default/lwc; npx tsc --project sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/lwc
scripts.prep-sggov: cp -a node_modules/@govtechsg/sgds/css/sgds.css sfGpsDsSgGov/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsSgGov; mkdir -p sfGpsDsSgGov/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsSgGov; cp -a node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.css sfGpsDsSgGov/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsSgGov; mkdir -p sfGpsDsSgGov/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsSgGov/fonts; cp -a node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/fonts/* sfGpsDsSgGov/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsSgGov/fonts; mkdir -p sfGpsDsSgGovFull
scripts.prep-caon: rm -rf sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnComponents/dist; mkdir -p sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnComponents/dist; cp -a node_modules/@ongov/ontario-design-system-component-library/dist/ontario-design-system-components sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnComponents/dist; rm -rf sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnComponents/dist/ontario-design-system-components/fonts; rm -rf sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnGlobalStyles/dist; cp -a node_modules/@ongov/ontario-design-system-global-styles/dist sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnGlobalStyles; rm -rf sfGpsDsCaOn/main/default/staticresources/sfGpsDsCaOnGlobalStyles/dist/styles/scss; mkdir -p sfGpsDsCaOnFull
scripts.prep: npm run prep-base; npm run prep-nsw; npm run prep-nsws; npm run prep-qld; npm run prep-vic2; npm run prep-frgov; npm run prep-ukgov;npm run prep-sggov; npm run prep-caon
scripts.base-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsOs;mkdir -p sfGpsDsOs;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsOs;mv -f sfGpsDsOs/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsOs/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsOs/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsOs/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsOs/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;rm -rf sfGpsDsSr;mkdir -p sfGpsDsSr;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsSr;rm -rf sfGpsDsSr/main/default/lwc/omnistudio-managed-package;find sfGpsDsSr/main/default/lwc -type d \( -regex '.*Os' -o -regex '.*OsN' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsSr/main/default/lwc -type f \( -regex '.*Os\.d\.ts' -o -regex '.*OsN\.d\.ts' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsSr/main/default/classes -type f \( -regex '.*OsN\.cls' -o -regex '.*OsN\.cls-meta\.xml' \) -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.aunsw-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsAuNswFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuNswFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsAuNswFull;cp -a sfGpsDsAuNsw/. sfGpsDsAuNswFull;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuNswSr;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuNswSr;cp -a sfGpsDsAuNswFull/. sfGpsDsAuNswSr;mv -f sfGpsDsAuNswFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsAuNswFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsAuNswFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsAuNswFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsAuNswFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuNswSr/main/default/lwc/omnistudio-managed-package;find sfGpsDsAuNswSr/main/default/lwc -type d \( -regex '.*Os' -o -regex '.*OsN' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuNswSr/main/default/lwc -type f \( -regex '.*Os.d.ts' -o -regex '.*OsN.d.ts' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuNswSr/main/default/classes -type f \( -regex '.*OsN\.cls' -o -regex '.*OsN\.cls-meta\.xml' \) -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.aunsws-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsAuNswSFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuNswSFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsAuNswSFull;cp -a sfGpsDsAuNswS/. sfGpsDsAuNswSFull;mv -f sfGpsDsAuNswSFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsAuNswSFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsAuNswSFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsAuNswSFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsAuNswSFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls
scripts.auqld-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsAuQldFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuQldFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsAuQldFull;cp -a sfGpsDsAuQld/. sfGpsDsAuQldFull;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuQldSr;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuQldSr;cp -a sfGpsDsAuQldFull/. sfGpsDsAuQldSr;mv -f sfGpsDsAuQldFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsAuQldFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsAuQldFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsAuQldFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsAuQldFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuQldSr/main/default/lwc/omnistudio-managed-package;find sfGpsDsAuQldSr/main/default/lwc -type d \( -regex '.*Os' -o -regex '.*OsN' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuQldSr/main/default/lwc -type f \( -regex '.*Os.d.ts' -o -regex '.*OsN.d.ts' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuQldSr/main/default/classes -type f \( -regex '.*OsN\.cls' -o -regex '.*OsN\.cls-meta\.xml' \) -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.auvic2-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsAuVic2Full;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuVic2Full;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsAuVic2Full;cp -a sfGpsDsAuVic2/. sfGpsDsAuVic2Full;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr;mkdir -p sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr;cp -a sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/. sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr;mv -f sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsAuVic2Full/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;rm -rf sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr/main/default/lwc/omnistudio-managed-package;find sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr/main/default/lwc -type d \( -regex '.*Os' -o -regex '.*OsN' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr/main/default/lwc -type f \( -regex '.*Os.d.ts' -o -regex '.*OsN.d.ts' \) -exec rm -rf {} +;find sfGpsDsAuVic2Sr/main/default/classes -type f \( -regex '.*OsN\.cls' -o -regex '.*OsN\.cls-meta\.xml' \) -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.frgov-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsFrGovFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsFrGovFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsFrGovFull;cp -a sfGpsDsFrGov/. sfGpsDsFrGovFull;mv -f sfGpsDsFrGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsFrGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsFrGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsFrGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsFrGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls
scripts.ukgov-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsUkGovFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsUkGovFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsUkGovFull;cp -a sfGpsDsUkGov/. sfGpsDsUkGovFull;mv -f sfGpsDsUkGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls sfGpsDsUkGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls;mv -f sfGpsDsUkGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN.cls-meta.xml sfGpsDsUkGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls-meta.xml;sed -i '' -e 's/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcControllerOsN/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController/g' sfGpsDsUkGovFull/main/default/classes/SfGpsDsIntegrationProcController.cls
scripts.caon-copy: rm -rf sfGpsDsCaOnFull;mkdir -p sfGpsDsCaOnFull;cp -a sfGpsDs/. sfGpsDsCaOnFull;cp -a sfGpsDsCaOn/. sfGpsDsCaOnFull;find sfGpsDsCaOnFull/main/default/classes -type f \( -regex '.*OsN\.cls' -o -regex '.*OsN\.cls-meta\.xml' \) -exec rm -rf {} +

author: Emmanuel Schweitzer at salesforce.com
